summary: Tested all 9 features related to edit/delete functionality of transfers and inseminations in the logs management modal. Fixed critical SQL bug in insemination_page.py (column observacoes does not exist). All core edit/update/delete flows working after fix.

ui_bugs.issue: No '📝 Modo de Edição' banner shown (unlike transfer_page.py which has one). User gets no visual indication they are in edit mode aside from the button text '🔄 Atualizar Inseminação'.

Lots (lotes) not pre-filled in edit mode. Code only looks for current available stock from same stallion/owner, not the original lot used. If stock is depleted, no lot is pre-filled and user must re-select manually.
Insemination date shows today's date instead of original insemination date in some cases (date pre-fill may not be working consistently).

action_items: Consider adding '📝 Modo de Edição - Modifique os dados e clique em Atualizar Inseminação' banner to insemination_page.py for UX consistency with transfer_page.py
Consider improving lotes pre-fill in insemination edit mode - currently uses current available stock rather than original lot, which fails when stock is 0
Verify insemination date pre-fill is working correctly (session state 'insem_data' should be set from original data)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: insemination_page.py line 101 - SQL query referenced 'i.observacoes' column which does not exist in 'inseminacoes' table. Fixed by removing i.observacoes from SELECT and setting observacoes='' in result dict, updating proprietario_nome index from row[7] to row[6].

insemination_page.py lot pre-fill uses a 'best effort' approach (LIMIT 1 current available lot) rather than the actual lot used in the original insemination. This is noted in a code comment but is a UX limitation.
Transfer type pre-fill uses 'if transfer_tipo not in session_state' guard which could cause stale state if user navigates back. Should forcefully set the type when entering edit mode.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing DB records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streamlit app at http://localhost:8501. Login: admin/admin123. Main features tested: (1) Dashboard ✏️ button -> logs modal with ✏️🗑️ per entry. (2) Internal transfer edit: WORKING - pre-fills lot, type Interna, destination, shows Atualizar button, UPDATE executes, dashboard shows ✏️ prefix. (3) External transfer edit: WORKING - pre-fills external fields (Destinatário, Motivo, Observações). (4) Insemination edit: FIXED (removed i.observacoes from SQL) - now loads correctly with garanhao/proprietario/egua pre-filled. Lots may not pre-fill if stock depleted. (5) Delete: WORKING - shows confirmation with irreversibility warning and palhetas to revert. Bug fixed: /app/modules/pages/insemination_page.py - removed non-existent 'i.observacoes' column from SQL query. Supervisor was restarted to apply module change.

rca_of_issue.bug: Insemination edit mode failed with 'column i.observacoes does not exist'
rca_of_issue.root_cause: insemination_page.py line 101 SELECT query included 'i.observacoes' but the 'inseminacoes' table schema (verified via information_schema.columns) has no 'observacoes' column. The column: id, garanhao, dono_id, data_inseminacao, egua, protocolo, palhetas_gastas, atualizado. The 'observacoes' field was referenced in the dict at index row[6] but proprietario_nome was at row[7] causing index mismatch.
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Removed i.observacoes from SELECT, set observacoes='' as default in result dict, updated proprietario_nome to row[6]
rca_of_issue.reproduction_steps: 1. Login as admin. 2. Open dashboard. 3. Click ✏️ button next to ATIVIDADE RECENTE. 4. In modal, click ✏️ next to any Inseminação entry. -> Shows red error banner.

tests_results.test_8_update_insemination_button: PARTIAL - button visible, UPDATE code path present, but lotes not pre-filled due to empty stock
